title: Daily Aggregate Context
description: Output of module 01 (Aggregate Alerts). Contains all alerts and clusters fetched from D1 for a topic/date. Used as the base input for all AI generation modules (02–07).

topic_slug.description: The topic being processed. Must be a valid topic_slug from the D1 topics table.

date_key.description: The date being processed in YYYY-MM-DD format.

publish_job_id.description: D1 ID of the publish_jobs row tracking this run. Used by module 10 to update job status.

alerts.description: All active alerts for this topic/date, ordered by importance_score DESC.

source_type.description: Technical source category (rss, api, social, webhook, x_account, x_query, newsapi). Null when unknown.

trust_tier.description: Trust classification from the source registry. T1=Official, T2=Wire, T3=Specialist, T4=Signal/Social. Null when unknown.

trust_score.description: Numeric trust score (0–100). Higher is more trusted. Null when unknown.

clusters.description: All event clusters for this topic/date, ordered by importance_score DESC.

alert_count.description: Total number of active alerts for this topic/date.

cluster_count.description: Total number of event clusters for this topic/date.

alerts.headline: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
alerts.summary_text: Bitcoin surged past $120,000, setting a new all-time high driven by strong institutional inflows.

clusters.summary_text: Bitcoin rally driven by ETF inflows and sovereign wealth fund allocation.
